title: notifications-mail — kill switches + rollout controls
description: Per-provider kill switches let ops flip a bad provider off in seconds without a redeploy. All kill switches default ON.

flags.description: Master mail dispatch kill switch. Off = all mail dispatches suppressed with reason=kill_switch. DB writes still happen so backfill retries when re-enabled.
Disable Mailgun immediately. Failover to next-configured provider.
Disable inbound provider webhook processing. Webhook receivers still respond 200 to prevent provider retries; ingestion is silently skipped. Used during ingestion incidents.
Refuses marketing sends when the tenant has no postal_address configured. Off = warns instead. Should always be on in production.
